---
title: "My project"
author: "nope"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    toc: true                
    toc-title: My contents   
    toc-location: right 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 127px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 350px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme:  
      light: sketchy
      dark:  darkly
    fontsize: 16px    
self-contained: true #lets other people to see graphs and images that are in the files, makes no changes un the visual
lang: en                
# if i chenge / to \ in images, он мне е складывает в ссылку
#for cros-referencing you need to know what is going on and how to call it
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
---

# Presentation

This is a Ceaser's website.
He is a very stupid kitten. Unfortunately for everyone around, he also is very small and cute. 

![This is NOT him](images/lizard.jpg){#fig-lizard}


He does not understand this: 
This is an in-line equation $$y = \beta_0 + \beta_1 X + \varepsilon$${#eq-myequation}

This is an  equation $$z = \dfrac{\bar{x} -\mu}{\sigma}$${#eq-myequation}
(neither am I)

## When will he go home? 

Ideally today
we treid to calculate it in @eq-myequation and in @eq-myequation

In @eq-cttt we did something very stupid

::: {.column-margin}
$$X = v+ERJ$${#eq-cttt}
:::


### Does he have a litter box?

Not yet
If you forgot what he does not look like, look at @fig-lizard

#### Whose fault is that? 

Amazon


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
this would be my first column
:::
  
::: {.g-col-2}
that's the second
::: 
  
::: {.g-col-4}
and the third
::: 
:::



If you want to know more about god knows what, look at the [Next](sub.html) file
